items.summary: Package 'ruff' has different versions across repos: 0.15.7 (ruff-vscode), 0.15.8 (ruff-pre-commit, ruff), 2026.38.0 (ruff-vscode)
items.details: ruff-vscode uses ruff==0.15.7; ruff-pre-commit uses ruff==0.15.8; ruff uses ruff==0.15.8; ruff-vscode uses ruff==2026.38.0

items.summary: ruff-vscode pins ruff==0.15.7 but ruff is at version 0.15.8
items.details: Consumer ruff-vscode depends on ruff==0.15.7; producer ruff reports current version as 0.15.8

items.summary: Repos in github.com/astral-sh use different owner formats: 'astral-sh' (ruff-pre-commit), 'astral-sh' (ruff-vscode), 'Astral Software Inc.' (ruff), '@eifinger (from package.json), astral-sh org' (setup-uv), 'Astral Software Inc.' (uv)
items.details: Same GitHub org 'astral-sh' has different ownership strings: @eifinger (from package.json), astral-sh org, Astral Software Inc., astral-sh

items.summary: ruff: Package Details mentions Docker Hub but Artifacts only reference GHCR
items.details: Package registry field says 'PyPI (primary), npm (WASM), Docker Hub, GitHub Releases', but artifacts reference: @astral-sh/ruff-wasm-*, container deployments, ghcr.io/astral-sh/ruff, github container registry, github releases, https://pypi.org/project/ruff/, multiple platforms, npm, pypi, ruff, web, node.js, bundler targets
Different rust toolchain versions may cause build inconsistencies

items.summary: Target 'linux' deployed by different CD systems: github actions (python-build-standalone, ruff-vscode), cargo-dist (uv)
items.details: Multiple repos target 'linux' using different CD pipelines

items.summary: Target 'macos' deployed by different CD systems: github actions (python-build-standalone, ruff-vscode, setup-uv), cargo-dist (uv)
items.details: Multiple repos target 'macos' using different CD pipelines
